headline: Leaders and Experts from Amazon Web Services, Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Meta, Dell, Applied Materials and AMD Headline Technology and Innovation Programming at CERAWeek by S&P Global, March 23-27 in Houston
summary: Leaders and experts from Amazon Web Services, Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Meta, Dell, Applied Materials and AMD will be among the technology and innovation speakers at CERAWeek by S&P Global—the world's preeminent energy conference—to be held in Houston March 23-27.
